title: Gallitrichum verbenacum
taxonomy: Gallitrichum verbenacum is a genus of liverworts in the family Lepidoziaceae. This genus is part of the subclass Jungermanniidae and class Jungermanniopsida. The classification further places Gallitrichum verbenacum in the division Marchantiophyta and kingdom Plantae. The division Marchantiophyta is a group of non-vascular plants that belong to the larger group Streptophyta. These classifications reflect the evolutionary relationships between Gallitrichum verbenacum and other related plant species.
intro: There is not enough information about the Gallitrichum verbenacum plant.
